purpose: Default priority chain for grammar version dispatch (router.hexa fallback order).

env_overrides.HEXA_GRAMMAR_VERSION: Single grammar version forced (no fallback). E.g. HEXA_GRAMMAR_VERSION=grammar_v1

default_chain_rationale: Phase β/γ/δ are SPEC-ONLY at this land. Default chain holds only WRAPPED v1 to keep router behavior conservative until v2-v4 impl cycles complete.
notes: Adding a new grammar version = update modules/grammar_format/grammar_v<N>.hexa + core/grammar_format/{registry,router,grammar_format_main}.hexa + this file's available list.
Status values: WRAPPED | STUB-FROM-SPEC | STUB-FUTURE | IMPLEMENTED.
shebang_trigger is matched in router.hexa grammar_detect_shebang() — must be exact line-1 match (whitespace-trimmed).
